column1: # /Range Name Reset — wipes every named range in the active file in
# one shot.  Idempotent on an empty name table.
# Seed two cells so two named ranges have something to point at.
# Sanity: F3 in goto pops the names and shows both.
# /Range Name Reset wipes both immediately, no prompt.
# F3 in goto now shows nothing — the names are gone.
